_meta.description: Collector-derived contract for the multipage applications matrix view.

summary_metrics.label: Tracked applications
summary_metrics.derivation: Count applications[] entries in this collector-derived artifact.

summary_metrics.label: Application matrix rows
summary_metrics.derivation: Count software suite rows in docs/data/test-surface.json.

summary_metrics.label: Rows with primary app results
summary_metrics.derivation: Count application rows whose software suite has a completed result with last_run.

summary_metrics.label: Rows with fallback Bazaar signals
summary_metrics.derivation: Count application rows that picked up coarse Bazaar fallback signals from published non-application results.

applications.derivation: Catalog entry from the page contract: applications v1 is Bazaar-only.

rows.state_reason: No completed Bazaar-specific software result is published for this variant/branch; fallback signals remain coarse only.
rows.derivation: Seed row from docs/data/test-surface.json software cells; join docs/results/bluefin-aurora-testing-software.json for primary evidence and attach coarse Bazaar fallback signals from matching non-application results.

rows.state_reason: No completed Bazaar-specific software result is published for this variant/branch; fallback signals remain coarse only.
rows.derivation: Seed row from docs/data/test-surface.json software cells; join docs/results/bluefin-bazzite-testing-software.json for primary evidence and attach coarse Bazaar fallback signals from matching non-application results.

Seed row from docs/data/test-surface.json software cells; join docs/results/bluefin-lts-testing-software.json for primary evidence and attach coarse Bazaar fallback signals from matching non-application results.

matched_scenarios: Bazaar flatpak preinstall file is present
fallback_signals.state_reason: Coarse fallback only: Bazaar evidence comes from scenario-name substring matching in a non-application suite.
fallback_signals.derivation: Case-insensitive /bazaar/ match against failed_scenarios in docs/results/bluefin-testing-common.json.

rows.derivation: Seed row from docs/data/test-surface.json software cells; join docs/results/bluefin-testing-software.json for primary evidence and attach coarse Bazaar fallback signals from matching non-application results.

Seed row from docs/data/test-surface.json software cells; join docs/results/dakota-testing-software.json for primary evidence and attach coarse Bazaar fallback signals from matching non-application results.
